name: Dabboos Dead Stock Sync — Frozen Capital

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'common', method: 'authenticate', args: [ $('Config').first().json.odooDb, $('Config').first().json.odooLogin, $('Config').first().json.odooApiKey, {} ] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc:'2.0', method:'call', params:{ service:'object', method:'execute_kw', args:[ $('Config').first().json.odooDb, $('Odoo Auth').first().json.result, $('Config').first().json.odooApiKey, 'stock.quant', 'read_group', [ [['location_id.usage','=','internal'],['quantity','>',0]], ['product_id','quantity:sum','value:sum'], ['product_id'] ], { lazy:false } ] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc:'2.0', method:'call', params:{ service:'object', method:'execute_kw', args:[ $('Config').first().json.odooDb, $('Odoo Auth').first().json.result, $('Config').first().json.odooApiKey, 'product.product', 'read', [ $('Odoo Stock (read_group)').first().json.result.map(g => Array.isArray(g.product_id) ? g.product_id[0] : g.product_id), ['display_name','default_code','categ_id','product_tmpl_id','standard_price'] ] ] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc:'2.0', method:'call', params:{ service:'object', method:'execute_kw', args:[ $('Config').first().json.odooDb, $('Odoo Auth').first().json.result, $('Config').first().json.odooApiKey, $('Config').first().json.brandModel, 'read', [ [...new Set($('Odoo Products (read)').first().json.result.map(p => Array.isArray(p.product_tmpl_id) ? p.product_tmpl_id[0] : p.product_tmpl_id))], [ $('Config').first().json.brandField ] ] ] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc:'2.0', method:'call', params:{ service:'object', method:'execute_kw', args:[ $('Config').first().json.odooDb, $('Odoo Auth').first().json.result, $('Config').first().json.odooApiKey, 'sale.order.line', 'read_group', [ [['order_id.state','in',['sale','done']],['create_date','>=', new Date(Date.now() - (Number($('Config').first().json.monthsBack)||12)*30*864e5).toISOString().slice(0,10)]], ['product_id','product_uom_qty:sum','create_date:max'], ['product_id','create_date:month'] ], { lazy:false } ] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc:'2.0', method:'call', params:{ service:'object', method:'execute_kw', args:[ $('Config').first().json.odooDb, $('Odoo Auth').first().json.result, $('Config').first().json.odooApiKey, 'sale.order.line', 'read_group', [ [['order_id.state','in',['sale','done']],['create_date','>=', new Date(Date.now() - 90*864e5).toISOString().slice(0,10)]], ['product_id','product_uom_qty:sum'], ['product_id'] ], { lazy:false } ] } }) }}
